messages.text: Why is my OpenAI token usage so high?

messages.header: curl -s localhost:5110/api/events | jq '[.[] | select(.summary | contains("openai"))] | length'

messages.text: Smello captured 6 calls to `api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions`. Each request body includes the full conversation history, and the `messages` array grows to 48 entries by the last call. The system prompt alone is 2,800 tokens. Trim old messages or summarize the history before each call.
